ddls:
CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the branch is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the branch is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the branch is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the branch */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the branch */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer became a member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the transaction occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applied to the transaction */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total price of the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the transaction */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "cogs" TEXT /* Cost of goods sold for the transaction */,
  "gross_margin_percentage" TEXT /* Gross margin percentage of the transaction */,
  "gross_income" TEXT /* Gross income from the transaction */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Customer rating for the transaction */,
  "week_beginning_monday" TEXT /* Week beginning Monday for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_tax" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Rate of tax applied */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for financial metrics */,
  "invoice_id" TEXT /* Reference to the invoice */,
  "cogs" TEXT /* Cost of goods sold for the transaction */,
  "gross_margin_percentage" TEXT /* Gross margin percentage of the transaction */,
  "gross_income" TEXT /* Gross income from the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "invoice_id" TEXT /* Reference to the invoice */,
  "rating_value" TEXT /* Value of the rating */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for time series data */,
  "invoice_id" TEXT /* Reference to the invoice */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the transaction */,
  "week_beginning_monday" TEXT /* Week beginning Monday for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for sales data */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line */,
  "week_beginning_monday" TEXT /* Week beginning Monday for the sales data */,
  "total_sales" TEXT /* Total sales amount for the week */,
  "total_units_sold" INTEGER /* Total units sold for the week */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average customer rating for the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line targeted by the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_campaigns_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)
